title: KW Soft Shade Small Round Pedal Bin 3ltr (Orange, 3 Ltr)
features: Metal Bin - Soft Sheen Finish - Range of Subtle Soft Shade Colours
Removable Plastic Inner Bucket - Handles on both Bin and Bucket
Perfect for Hygenic Waste Disposal in Compact Places
Quality product from a German Manufacturer
description: KW Small Pedal Bin finished in a range of soft sheen , soft shade colours to suit many decor schemes. Small size lends itself to being suitable for limited spaces in the house. Foot Pedal and removable bucket offer hygenic waste disposal. Designed and manufactured by a German Company to meet exacting standards at an affordable price.
